_comment: HSI Agents System Configuration - Informational Singularity Hypothesis
_description: Edit these values to customize your experiment
_author: Iban Borràs in collaboration with Augment Agent

_help.use_compression: Enable automatic compression for large sequences
_help.max_ram_gb: Maximum RAM to use for hybrid collapse (GB). Set based on your available RAM.
_help.max_disk_tb: Safety limit: stop if accumulation exceeds this size (TB)

_help.min_pattern_length: Minimum length of patterns to detect
_help.min_occurrences: Minimum number of occurrences to consider a pattern

_help.min_rule_confidence: Minimum confidence to accept a rule (0.0-1.0)

_help.min_validation_score: Minimum score to consider a rule valid

_help.raster_bits_limit: Max number of bits to use for 2D raster images (e.g., 14000000)
_help.raster_iter_cap: When iterations exceed this cap, raster2d will render this iteration instead
_help.absolute_token: Absolute token for decay frame: '1', '10' or '01'

_help.max_bits: Max bits to read for Hilbert map (streaming)
_help.target_grid: Hilbert grid size (power of 2 recommended, e.g., 1024 or 2048)

_help.max_iterations_to_load: Maximum number of iterations to load into memory
_help.pattern_window_sizes: Window sizes for pattern detection (in bits)
_help.max_memory_gb: Maximum memory to use for Level 1 analysis (in GB)
_help.enable_tar_compression: Compress all iteration snapshots into single tar.gz file
_help.export_metadata: Export metadata.json with iteration info for Level 1
_help.enable_structural_analysis: Enable v33 structural analysis (nesting, containment, order)
_help.structural_metrics: List of structural metrics to compute: nesting, containment, stratified_order
_help.max_nesting_depth: Maximum expected nesting depth for structural analysis

_presets._comment: Predefined configurations for different use cases
_presets._usage: Copy values from a preset to the corresponding sections

quick_test._description: Quick test to verify everything works

_tips.performance: To improve performance: reduce max_iterations, disable visualizations
_tips.quality: For better quality: increase cross_validation_folds, reduce thresholds
_tips.compression: Compression activates automatically when sequence exceeds memory_threshold
